duplicate_input_metric.formula: sum((occurrences - 1) * utf8_bytes) for identical normalized string leaves

provenance.explanation: Compatibility is anchored to the published 0.6.24 contract. Efficiency is anchored separately to task-parent main commit 1a702e160ba9f0efe7067f2a22fc008defc89ffb and to runner artifacts already committed at that revision. Artifact-backed telemetry is observed; expected traces, outcomes, and evidence controls are synthetic RF-04 controls and are never counted as observed cost.

source_artifact.relevance: Historical direct code-run sample. Raw runner fields come from the artifact; scenario quality comes from the explicit golden control.
Historical dry-run preparation sample with committed bundle and bootstrap; it has no execution result metrics.
